data.name: 精靈的性愛農場
data.detailed_description:
◆故事背景：


生為一個貴族，你與你的女僕之間的戀情不被允許，於是你帶著你的女僕私奔，逃離你的家族，買了一個了無人煙的偏遠地區的廢棄小屋，這裡將會是你為來生活的地方；你下定決心捲起袖子，開拓土地、建設家園，規劃未來。



囤積物資，避免受寒受餓；在這樣艱辛的日子裡，你的女僕，她將陪伴你左右，白天將為你工作，夜晚替你消解勞頓；此外，在這世界中，魔物會捕抓女性用來繁衍後代，當你把她們從魔物手中拯救出來後，作為報答，她們將供你使喚。

◆遊戲玩法：


蒐集物資、規劃農地、搭建圍籬、飼養家畜，白天辛勤的工作，夜晚享受甜蜜的生活，一步步解鎖更多的製作內容以及各種「情趣道具」和「H體位」，甚至讓女性懷孕，你都能在遊戲中體驗。

◆遊戲內容：


◇30張以上基本CG，150張以上差分
◇合計超過50種以上的合成材料，道具和建築物件
◇數十種特殊場景及生活在不同地區的生物
◇3個自由活動地圖，並富含日夜變化

data.short_description: 精靈的性愛農場是一個結合色情和經營的農場遊戲，在這奇幻的世界中，你和她過著充滿性愛的日子。賺取財富，蒐攏更多的女性，發展家園。
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 土耳其文, 日文, 韓文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.7+ GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX9 Support, 2GB GPU RAM
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX9.0c compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Elf Sex Farm
data.detailed_description:
◆Story Background:


Born a nobleman, your love affair with your maid was not allowed, so you took your maid and ran away from your family. You bought an abandoned cottage in a remote area where you would live for the rest of your life; you were determined to roll up your sleeves, develop the land, build your home, and cope with all kinds of changes to the world around you. You needed to plan for the future.



You should stock up on supplies to protect you from the cold and hunger. In these hard times, the maid who accompanied you will work for you during the day and relieve your fatigue at night. In addition, this is a world where demons capture women to breed their offspring. If you save them from the demons, they will be at your disposal in return.

◆Gameplay Instructions:


Collect supplies, plan the farm, build fences, keep livestock, work hard during the day, and enjoy the sweet life at night. Unlock more content to produce and a variety of “sex toys” and “sex positions" step by step. You can even experience making women pregnant in the game.

◆Game Features:


◇More than 30 basic CGs, including more than 150 differentials
◇More than 50 types of synthetic materials, props, and construction devices in total
◇Dozens of special scenes and creatures living in different areas
◇3 maps with day and night changes, which you can roam freely

data.short_description: Elves’ Sex Farm is a farming game that combines eroticism and business management in a fantasy world where you live a sex-filled life. Earn a fortune, collect more women, develop your home.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Turkish, Japanese, Korean, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Spanish - Spain

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: 1.7+ GHz
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX9 Support, 2GB GPU RAM
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX9.0c compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
